studies.name: ANALYSIS Platform as a Service for CMS
studies.description: Editable baseline to compare architecture options across scenarios and reusable analysis profiles.

payload.project_name: ANALYSIS Platform as a Service for CMS
payload.project_description: Editable baseline to compare architecture options across scenarios and reusable analysis profiles.

alternatives.name: PaaS
alternatives.description: Platform-centric option with managed runtime capabilities.

alternatives.name: No PaaS
alternatives.description: Self-managed stack with tighter operational control.

attributes.name: Evolvability
attributes.description: Ease of extension and change over time.

attributes.name: Certification Fit
attributes.description: Alignment with DAL-E evidence and certification activities.

attributes.name: Sovereignty
attributes.description: Control over deployment, runtime, and restricted environments.

scenarios.name: Rapid Delivery
scenarios.description: Compressed delivery timeline and pressure on speed.

scenarios.name: Sovereign Operations
scenarios.description: Control, certification rigor, and deployment sovereignty.

profiles.name: Risk Aversion
profiles.description: Favors control, certification fit, and operational predictability.

profiles.name: Future Proof
profiles.description: Favors evolvability, fast capability growth, and long-term adaptability.

formulas.name: Architectural Benefit Score
formulas.description: ABS for one profile and scenario.

formulas.name: Scenario Weighted ABS
formulas.description: ABS multiplied by normalized scenario weight.

studies.name: ANALYSIS
studies.description: Editable baseline to compare architecture options across scenarios and reusable analysis profiles.

payload.project_description: Editable baseline to compare architecture options across scenarios and reusable analysis profiles.

alternatives.name: PaaS
alternatives.description: Platform-centric option with managed runtime capabilities.

alternatives.name: No PaaS
alternatives.description: Self-managed stack with tighter operational control.

attributes.name: Evolvability
attributes.description: Ability to integrate new subsystems and evolve functionality.

attributes.name: Operational_resilience
attributes.description: Fault handling, recovery, and failure containment

attributes.name: Configurability
attributes.description: Configuration consistency, deployment and system management

attributes.name: Portability
attributes.description: Ability to adapt to new platforms and environments

scenarios.name: S1. Integration of a new susbsystem
scenarios.description: Time needed to integrate a new subsystem in the CMS

scenarios.name: S2. CMS update
scenarios.description: Capability to deploy new functionalities. Intra/extra CMS.

scenarios.name: S3. Service and system failure
scenarios.description: Fast diagnostics, fast fixing and resilience

scenarios.name: S4. Configuration management
scenarios.description: Total traceability and system integrity throughout the aircraft's operational life

scenarios.name: S5. Portability
scenarios.description: Deploy CMS core on the other missions without modification

profiles.name: Risk Aversion
profiles.description: Favors control, certification fit, and operational predictability.

profiles.name: Future Proof
profiles.description: Favors evolvability, fast capability growth, and long-term adaptability.

formulas.name: no_paas_implementation_cost_score
formulas.description: Implementation cost for No PaaS solution (1-5)

formulas.name: Benefit to Cost and Risk
formulas.description: Benefit(A) divided by the weighted sum of cost and risk.
